Class PKIFacade

extends java.lang.Object

 byte[] authenticate(java.lang.String szPin, java.lang.String data)
          Sign the data with the authentication keypair
 byte[] authenticateCSP(java.lang.String data)
          Sign the data using the authentication keypair, the PIN is cached

          Use to download remote CRLs

          Export the Auth Certificate
 java.security.cert.Certificate exportSignCertificate()
          Export the Signing Certificate

          Sign the data with the signing keypair
 byte[] signDataCSP(java.lang.String data)
          Sign the Data using the signing keypair, the PIN is cached
 boolean validateCertificateCDP(java.security.cert.Certificate cert)
          Validate the Certificate against the CDP, this function extract the CRL from the CDP, download the CRL and validate the certificate
 boolean validateCertificateOffline(java.security.cert.Certificate cert, java.security.cert.CRL crl)
          Validate the certificate with local CRL
 boolean verify(java.lang.String data, java.security.cert.Certificate cert, byte[] signature)
          Verify PKCS#1 signature

a PKCS#1 signature

data - to be signed

verify

public boolean verify(java.lang.String data,
                      java.security.cert.Certificate cert,
                      byte[] signature)
               throws java.lang.Exception
Verify PKCS#1 signature

Parameters:
data - signed data
cert - Certificate containing the PublicKey
signature - PKCS#1 signature
Returns:
true if the signature is valid
Throws:
java.lang.Exception

validateCertificateOffline

public boolean validateCertificateOffline(java.security.cert.Certificate cert,
                                          java.security.cert.CRL crl)
                                   throws java.lang.Exception
Validate the certificate with local CRL

Parameters:
cert - CErtificate object to be validated
crl - CRL object
Returns:
true if the certificate is not revoked
Throws:
java.lang.Exception

downloadCRL

public java.security.cert.CRL downloadCRL(java.lang.String url)
                                   throws java.lang.Exception
Use to download remote CRLs

Parameters:
url - of the remote CRL
Returns:
the CRL in DER encoded format
Throws:
java.lang.Exception

validateCertificateCDP

public boolean validateCertificateCDP(java.security.cert.Certificate cert)
                               throws java.io.IOException,
                                      java.security.cert.CRLException,
                                      java.security.cert.CertificateEncodingException,
                                      java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                      java.security.PrivilegedActionException
Validate the Certificate against the CDP, this function extract the CRL from the CDP, download the CRL and validate the certificate

Parameters:
cert - Certificate object to be validated
Returns:
true if the certificate is not revoked
Throws:
java.security.PrivilegedActionException
java.lang.Exception
java.io.IOException
java.security.cert.CRLException
java.security.cert.CertificateEncodingException
java.security.cert.CertificateException
